sessionMethod: local mobile session fixture because the running local backend did not expose Round-8 /rest/remote-access pairing/status endpoints; GraphQL/workspace/file/run APIs were exercised against the local backend.

observations.homeReadableRows: PASS: Home recent rows use vertical MobileReadableWorkRow layout; titles/details/meta are visible at phone viewport.
observations.existingTeamRunContinuation: PASS: Continue latest run opens Software Engineering Team team run with visible conversation and composer.
observations.activityTeamMessagesToolHistory: PASS: Activity shows task plan card, visible team message rows, tool activity rows, and an explicit unsupported terminal/browser/tool-pane notice.
observations.filePreview: PASS: Files search/open README.md shows actual authorized file content instead of placeholder copy.
observations.fileAttachActiveRun: PASS: Attach from README.md reports added to current run Chat context and Chat shows mobile context tray with README.md.
observations.workspaceContextIsolation: PASS: Selecting workspace context clears stale active run display; Activity shows select-team/select-run notices rather than prior run messages/tool activity.
observations.draftAttachment: PASS: Attaching article.md from a workspace context targets next mobile run launch; Chat tray shows draft attachment and Run Setup shows 1 context file will be attached.
observations.newAgentLaunch: PASS with environment terminal error: Mobile run setup allowed target/workspace/prompt launch and landed in new Memory Compactor Chat; backend/model runtime returned ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable is not set.
observations.newTeamLaunch: PASS with environment terminal error: Mobile run setup allowed team/workspace/prompt launch and landed in new ClassRoomSimulation team Chat; backend/model runtime returned ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable is not set.
observations.mobileWorkspaceRedirect: PASS: /mobile/workspace redirects to /mobile?unsupported=desktopWorkspace and renders mobile unsupported notice.
observations.desktopWorkspaceNoRegression: PASS: /workspace renders desktop navigation/content and no mobile-remote-access-shell. Note: browser viewport was mobile-sized during spot-check, but route remained desktop shell rather than mobile shell.

environmentLimitations: The running local AutoByteus backend on 127.0.0.1:29695 returned 404 for /rest/remote-access/status, /rest/remote-access/settings, and /rest/remote-access/pairing-sessions, so status/pairing REST was not revalidated against that live backend in this browser pass.

New agent/team launch reached the real launch path but the runtime produced ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable is not set; this is classified as validation-environment/runtime configuration, not mobile UI failure.
